title: Operation Armageddon
notes: Body focus arm day with HIIT intensity. Primary: biceps / triceps. Secondary: metabolic conditioning.

items: Treadmill Run (5 min incline, build to pace)

blocks.name: Iron Circuit
blocks.instructions: Alternate push/pull. 60 sec rest between supersets.

exercises.name: Barbell Curl
exercises.notes: Load: (75-45)/2=15 per side -> 10 +5. Form: full ROM.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Bench Press
exercises.notes: Load: (135-45)/2=45 per side -> 1 45s. Elbows in, low chest path.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Overhead Triceps Extension
exercises.notes: Single DB, both hands above head. Full range.

exercises.name: BB 21s (Curls)
exercises.notes: Curl early set; 7 bottom, 7 top, 7full straight.
